v1.0.0.description:
First public release of HP2PC_AP, an Archipelago multiworld randomizer for *Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets* (PC, 2002 KnowWonder release).

## Contents
- **108 items**: 7 spells (3 starter precollected) & 101 wizard cards
- **105 checks**: 4 spell-tutorial classrooms & 101 card pickups
- **Goal**: defeat the Basilisk (post-fight Great Hall walk-in fires the credits cutscene which goals).

## What's in the multiworld
- All 4 non-starter spells (Rictusempra, Skurge, Diffindo, Spongify) and every wizard card are shuffled.
- Mod-side bookcase blockers gate each spell-tutorial classroom until you receive the spell.
- Vendors keep selling missed cards as a beans-priced AP recovery path for un-replayable levels.
- HUD toast feedback for received and sent items.

## Install
Download all four assets below, then follow `PLAYER_SETUP.md`. Requires:
- HP2 retail (KnowWonder 2002)
- HP2Engine 3.4 (Metallicafan212's M212 patch, free, from the HP2 modding Discord)
- Archipelago framework (latest stable from archipelago.gg), tested with 0.6.7

## Known v1 limitations
- Boomslang / Bicorn / BitOGoyle flow through vanilla story progression (returning as AP items in v2)
- Bean filler is non-durable across client crashes
- Save-load detection across different multiworld slots not enforced (one save dir per seed recommended)

Issues / questions: ping Kryen in the Archipelago Discord.

v1.1.0.description:
## HP2PC_AP v1.1.0

  End-to-end playable with a much larger seed. Up to **276 checks** when every category toggle is on vs 105 in v1.0.

  ### Headline changes
  - **5 new check categories** wired end-to-end:
    - **109 secret areas** across every level (`enable_secrets`, default on)
    - **44 challenge stars** across the 4 spell-challenge levels (`enable_challenge_stars`, default on)
    - **10 ranked duels** at the Dueling Club (`enable_duelling`, default off)
    - **6 Quidditch matches** at the Quidditch pitch (`enable_quidditch_matches`, default off)
    - **2 Fred & George vendor upgrades**: Nimbus 2001 and Quidditch Armour (`enable_quidditch_upgrades`, default off)
  - **Per-category yaml toggles**: dial difficulty by enabling only the categories you want.
  - **Tier-prefixed card names**: AP item strings now read `Silver Card - Duke` instead of bare `Duke`, so other players can tell at a glance that you found a card.
  - **5 new filler types**: Massive Pile of Beans, Wiggenweld Potion, Wiggentree Bark, Flobberworm Mucous and Chocolate Frog.

  ### Quality-of-life
  - **One-click client launch.** The HP2 PC Client is now a button in ArchipelagoLauncher (next to your other AP clients), so you no longer need a separate `.exe` or a Python command line. Drop `harry_potter_2_pc.apworld` into `<Archipelago install>\custom_worlds\`, restart the launcher, and click **HP2 PC Client**, the Kivy GUI opens and you connect with `/connect <server>:<port>` as usual.
  - Spell-tutorial checks fire on lesson-**end** (after the wand-tracing minigame) instead of on classroom entry.
  - AP grant drains correctly pause while the in-game menu is open.
  - `start_inventory_from_pool` works for HP2 PC slots.
  - Chamber of Secrets Part 2 now correctly shows X/3 secrets in the pause menu (the unobtainable marker is removed at level load, base game ships 4 secrets but 1 is not findable).

  ### Upgrading from v1.0
  - Drop the new `HPArchipelago.u` and `harry_potter_2_pc.apworld` over your existing files (same locations as v1.0; see `PLAYER_SETUP.md`).
  - Regenerate the yaml template from ArchipelagoLauncher to pick up the new toggles, then copy your chosen settings into your slot yaml.
  - Existing v1.0 seeds keep working, no save format changed.

  ### Files
  - `HPArchipelago.u`: compiled UScript mod
  - `Default.ini`: pre-patched engine config (not needed to patch if the mod worked before)
  - `harry_potter_2_pc.apworld`: AP world (client bundled)
  - `PLAYER_SETUP.md`: install + first-run guide
v1.1.0.title: v1.1.0
